title: Design, Forests & Nordic Calm
description: A refined Nordic country of island cities, medieval old towns, Arctic wilderness, design culture, forests, lakes, and coastal archipelagos.

bestTime.description: Best for Stockholm archipelago trips, outdoor cafés, island hopping, and long daylight.
Best for Swedish Lapland, snow activities, northern lights, and the Icehotel.

highlights.title: Stockholm Archipelago
highlights.subtitle: 30,000 Islands
highlights.description: A vast maritime landscape of islands, skerries, ferries, kayaking routes, and red wooden cottages.

highlights.title: Gamla Stan
highlights.subtitle: Medieval Stockholm
highlights.description: One of Europe’s most atmospheric old towns, filled with cobblestone alleys, colorful buildings, and royal history.

highlights.title: Swedish Lapland & Icehotel
highlights.subtitle: Arctic Sweden
highlights.description: A northern region of Sámi culture, reindeer, aurora skies, snow landscapes, and the famous Icehotel.

destinations.name: Stockholm
destinations.description: Sweden’s capital is built across islands, blending royal history, modern design, museums, and waterfront living.

destinations.name: Gamla Stan
destinations.description: Stockholm’s old town features narrow medieval streets, colorful squares, churches, cafés, and the Royal Palace.

destinations.name: Stockholm Archipelago
destinations.description: A sea of thousands of islands where visitors can take ferries, kayak, hike, and stay in peaceful coastal villages.

destinations.name: Gothenburg
destinations.description: A relaxed west-coast city known for canals, seafood, cafés, parks, and access to coastal islands.

destinations.name: Abisko National Park
destinations.description: A northern wilderness area famous for aurora viewing, hiking trails, mountains, and Arctic scenery.

destinations.name: Kiruna
destinations.description: A Swedish Lapland town known for Arctic nature, Sámi culture, northern lights, and access to the Icehotel.

destinations.name: Icehotel
destinations.description: A unique hotel and art exhibition in Jukkasjärvi, rebuilt with ice and snow each winter.

destinations.name: Visby
destinations.description: A medieval town on Gotland island known for city walls, cobbled streets, ruins, and Baltic Sea charm.

destinations.name: Malmö
destinations.description: A southern Swedish city with modern architecture, coastal parks, multicultural food, and easy links to Copenhagen.

destinations.name: Dalarna
destinations.description: A region of lakes, red cottages, forests, folk traditions, and classic Swedish countryside scenery.

destinations.name: Gotland
destinations.description: A Baltic island known for limestone coastlines, medieval heritage, summer beaches, and the town of Visby.

destinations.name: Uppsala
destinations.description: A historic university city with a grand cathedral, riverfront, gardens, and cultural heritage.

experiences.title: Watch the Northern Lights in Abisko
